# API Task

## Mission
Implement Screenplay REST tasks with strict single-request behavior.

## Responsibilities
- Create one class per API action.
- Ensure each task sends exactly one HTTP request.
- Keep endpoint paths and payloads aligned with IA_P1 API contracts.
- Avoid business assertions inside tasks.

## Mandatory Rules
- One Task = one HTTP request.
- No commented code.
- Use semantic English names.
